lines.text: You don't need more material. You need judgment.
Reproduction becomes cheap. Responsibility becomes expensive.
The right question is worth more than the quick answer.
The Radical Middle does not mediate between everything. It distinguishes.
Between cynicism and fanaticism there is a thinking stance.
Real problems are interdisciplinary and contradictory.
AI is a sparring partner, counter-voice, and stress test.
AI does not threaten the essence of design – it ends the confusion of design with software operation.
When machines take over machine-like work, human judgment becomes the central resource.
First the stroke, then the answer. First the draft, then the algorithmic unfolding.
Not the abolition of Disegno, but its return.
More human through a more wisely guided AI.
